settings.title: What to Actually Do for Your Skin Between Facials
settings.excerpt: A whole shelf of products is rarely the answer, and one habit beats all of them.
settings.body:
Clients ask us constantly which products they should be buying. Honestly, the routine matters far more than the shelf.

We see beautifully cared-for skin on people with three products, and irritated skin on people with thirty. The difference is almost never the price of the bottle.

The two habits that matter most

Wear sunscreen every day. Nothing else you do will protect your skin as much, even in winter, even indoors by a window. Daylight ages skin year round, not just on the beach.

Do less, not more. A gentle cleanser and a good moisturizer beat a ten-step routine that leaves skin irritated. When skin reacts, the usual cause is too many active ingredients fighting each other, not too few.

A simple routine that holds up

If you want something to actually follow, keep it to this:

  • A gentle cleanser, morning and night.
  • A moisturizer suited to your skin.
  • Sunscreen every morning, rain or shine.

Drink water and sleep when you can. It is dull advice, but your skin shows both faster than anything in a bottle.

Come to your facials and we will tell you honestly what, if anything, is worth adding for your skin. Often the answer is nothing, and that is a perfectly good answer.
